title: Cylindrolobus lindleyi
uses: Cylindrolobus lindleyi is a plant species that is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. However, more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and proper usage.

The family Dipterocarpaceae is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Asia, and Cylindrolobus lindleyi is one of its many species.
